TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_pasakacedas_tua_asiya, title = pasakacedas_tua_asiya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/pasakacedas_tua_asiya} }

S.FORM: pasakacedas tua asiya kinaizuan a itua iyurasiya (Eurasia) a kadjunangan a i pasaviri a papamaw tua tja buru a kadjunangan mavan aicu a pasakacedas tua asiya a kadjunangan. pinapungadan kadjunangan kukka Tailiku Hong Kong Macau Taiwan Dripun North Korea South Korea Mongolia pacunu uta Asiya iyurupu averika == kasizuan ==
S.PHON: pasakaʦədas tua asija kinaizuan a itua ijurasija (əurasia) a kaɉunaŋan a i pasaviri a papamaw tua ʦa buru a kaɉunaŋan mavan aiʦu a pasakaʦədas tua asija a kaɉunaŋan. pinapuŋadan kaɉunaŋan kukka taiɭiku huŋ kuŋ maʦau taiwan ɖipun nurth kurəa suuth kurəa muŋuɭia paʦunu uta asija ijurupu avərika == kasizuan ==
S.FORM: pasakacedas tua asiya kinaizuan a itua iyurasiya (Eurasia) a kadjunangan a i pasaviri a papamaw tua tja buru a kadjunangan mavan aicu a pasakacedas tua asiya a kadjunangan. pinapungadan kadjunangan kukka Tailiku Hong Kong Macau Taiwan Dripun North Korea South Korea Mongolia pacunu uta Asiya iyurupu averika == kasizuan ==
S.PHON: pasakaʦədas tua asija kinaizuan a itua ijurasija (əurasia) a kaɉunaŋan a i pasaviri a papamaw tua ʦa buru a kaɉunaŋan mavan aiʦu a pasakaʦədas tua asija a kaɉunaŋan. pinapuŋadan kaɉunaŋan kukka taiɭiku huŋ kuŋ maʦau taiwan ɖipun nurth kurəa suuth kurəa muŋuɭia paʦunu uta asija ijurupu avərika == kasizuan ==
